query: SELECT a.apt_name, a.sigungu, a.dong, t.contract_date, t.price_krw, t.area_m2 FROM transactions t JOIN apartments a ON t.apt_id = a.id ORDER BY t.contract_date DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45SeMPVVWbWtu9a.7862c7fde036 --database Q77QHiwVKcvLETyWsxWgjH --execute SELECT a.apt_name, a.sigungu, a.dong, t.contract_date, t.price_krw, t.area_m2 FROM transactions t JOIN apartments a ON t.apt_id = a.id ORDER BY t.contract_date DESC LIMIT 5;
